translation.literal_translation: And because of abiding and eating. (7)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.7: the dual predicates of witness-abiding and fruit-eating in the two-birds text support Ishvara-jiva distinction and deny finite jiva as final ayatana.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra cue for the sthiti-adana proof line.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with consistent inferential labeling and S04-style structure.
A later philological sweep should revisit bhuma/samprasada nuance and long-compound Sanskrit segmentation.
